levels.headerTitle:
Break through your English
vocabulary plateau
levels.headerDescription:
6,500 high-frequency words covering
>98% of everyday vocabulary
levels.modalDescription:
Finish the previous levels at 90%+
to unlock this one.

paywall.subtitle:
Break through your language plateau —
master the 6,500 words educated
native speakers actually use
paywall.feature.unlimited.title: Unlimited daily words
paywall.feature.unlimited.description:
Learn as many new words
as you want every day.
paywall.feature.unlock.title: Unlock all levels
paywall.feature.unlock.description:
Instant access to every
locked level.
paywall.terms.preamble: By subscribing you agree to our
paywall.autoRenewDisclosure: Subscription renews automatically unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Payment is charged to your iTunes / Google Play account at purchase confirmation. Manage your subscription in your account settings.
paywall.alert.signInBody: Sign in with Google or Apple to subscribe.
paywall.alert.notRestoredBody: If you've subscribed before, sign in with the same account.

settings.nativeLanguageHint: Sets both the interface language and the word-translation language
settings.targetLanguageHint: Pick the language you want to learn

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: So your progress doesn't get lost

learn.finished.noNewDescription:
No new words available. You can
pick another category or adjust
your progress.
learn.finished.flipAllNew:
You've gone through all available words.
Reset the filter, or pick another
difficulty level.
learn.finished.flipAllRepeats:
You've reviewed all words. Reset the
filter, or pick another level.
learn.intervalHint: For better retention, cards are shown again at intervals from 5 minutes up to 7 days.
learn.promo.unlimited:
Get MiroLang Pro and learn
unlimited words every day
learn.promo.title: MiroLang Pro features

support.description:
— an app where you can learn
vocabulary level by level, review what
you've already learned, and lock it in.

overview.resetWord.title: Reset word progress?
overview.resetWord.description: This resets the word back to the start of its review cycle.
overview.empty.skipped.title: No skipped words
overview.empty.skipped.description: You haven't skipped any words yet. Mark familiar words as “Skip” to see them here.
overview.empty.learning.title: No words to repeat
overview.empty.learning.description: You have no words to repeat. Mark new words as “Learn” to see them here.
overview.empty.learned.title: No learned words
overview.empty.learned.description: You haven't learned any words yet. Complete all repeats for a word to see it here.

slide1.title:
Start with the words
you'll see most often
slide1.text:
Levels are ordered by word frequency,
from common to rare.

slide2.title:
Stay in control
of your progress
slide2.text:
Skip what you know, learn what's new,
revisit what you forgot.

slide3.title:
Try it free
right now
slide3.text:
Master the 6,500 words educated
native speakers actually use.
